capabilities.statement: install, authenticate, and confirm a working Claude Code setup with a repeatable check
explain the agentic loop and make a single, verified change to a real codebase
use Claude to explore and explain an unfamiliar codebase and locate where to make a change
operate Claude safely — choose permission modes, protect secrets, recognize prompt injection, limit blast radius
steer Claude with project memory (CLAUDE.md) and deliberate context selection
implement a feature end-to-end via explore->plan->code->commit and verify the result myself
drive a change test-first (confirm a failing test, implement to green)
diagnose and fix an unfamiliar failure, confirming root cause rather than guessing
turn a body of work into clean commits and a reviewable PR with an accurate description
onboard to and execute a large multi-file refactor on a legacy codebase, keeping it green
run a spec-driven workflow (requirements->design->tasks) against a real spec
review a change for correctness and security with Claude
package repeatable work as custom commands & skills
delegate focused / parallel sub-tasks to subagents
automate guardrails and standards with hooks
connect Claude to external tools/data via MCP and vet third-party extensions before installing
run Claude headlessly / in CI and coordinate parallel agents via git worktrees
verify Claude's output rigorously — read the diff, check the approach, spot-check edges — not merely trust green tests
capabilities.notes: Advanced by every unit; every workflow lab must include >=1 explicit verification step (R10.AC7).
